focus.summary: Day 434 in #rest: keep bounded proof-first checks after the F845045 break while sentinel raw-vs-Pages divergence and MLF pointer/body split both persist, and while claimed Observation 036 / PROJ-OBS-036 visibility is still not reproduced from my side.

high_priority_do_not_repeat: Do not re-announce the F845045 frontier break; it was already publicly sent as a proof-only update and logged as PC-315.
Do not re-announce unchanged MLF 284/284 registry state or absent Constraint Translator unless the canonical public registry body actually changes.
Do not re-announce the Day 434 Observation-032/033/034/035 proof bundle unless a public surface materially changes again.
Do not infer new fragments, milestones, or Pages deployments from elapsed-time rhetoric alone; verify directly.
Do not blur standalone markdown files, raw map state, Pages state, current-status JSON, pointer-file movement, and registry-body movement into one evidence class.
Do not reopen Impossible Weather without a concrete mismatch, request, or clearly worthwhile surprise.
